zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry DUTTON於1344年出生在英國英格蘭爾達頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Dutton30歲，母親Eleanor Thornton28歲。他於1365年與Eleanor Thornton Fitton在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1386年在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry DUTTON于1344年出生在英国英格兰爾達頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Dutton30岁，母亲Eleanor Thornton28岁。他于1365年与Eleanor Thornton Fitton在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1386年在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: DUTTON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry DUTTON was born in 1344, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Dutton, was 30 and his mother, Eleanor Thornton, was 28. He married Eleanor Thornton Fitton in 1365, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1386, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry DUTTON est né en 1344, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Dutton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Thornton, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Thornton Fitton en 1365, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1386, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry DUTTON 1344 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Dutton 30 und seine Mutter Eleanor Thornton 28. Er hat 1365 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Thornton Fitton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1386 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry DUTTON è nato il nel 1344 nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Dutton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Thornton, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Thornton Fitton nel 1365, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1386, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry DUTTONが1344年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Duttonは30歳，母Eleanor Thorntonは28歳であった。1365年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでEleanor Thornton Fittonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1386年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry DUTTON(이)가 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Dutton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Thornton(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Eleanor Thornton Fitton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry DUTTON nasceu em 1344, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Dutton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Thornton, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Thornton Fitton em 1365, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1386, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry DUTTON родился в 1344 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Dutton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Thornton, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Thornton Fitton в 1365 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1386 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry DUTTON nació en 1344, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Dutton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Eleanor Thornton, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Eleanor Thornton Fitton en 1365, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1386, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
